transcript: —Glass Nickel. How can I help you?
[delay & reverb] Hi! How’re you doin’ tonight? Hey!—
Good! I’d like to place an order, please. [to self] Oh, fu—
—I’m just gonna come pick it up, if I can pick up, please?—
Okay, what can I get for you?

Um, can I get, like, a small pineapple [delay & reverb] and, uh, and, like, a extra large pineapple? And, ah, just go ahead with that and then go do, like, a triple, uh, triple pepperoni—just a regular-sized pizza but with a triple portion—
—Uh, I’m sorry, I—I can’t really hear ya.
—So, “small pineapple, large pineapple”, is what I got.

Yeah, and like a triple portion of pepperoni, you know what I mean? Just whatever the normal portion is, just times that by, uh, [delay & reverb] by triple and then just get that goin’ on that one for me. And then maybe some breadsticks—
—You want—you want triple pine—[chuckles]—you want triple pineapple—you want triple pepperoni on the large pineapple?
[delay & reverb] I want triple pineapple on the triple pepperoni and then if you could put pepper—
—Yeah, there’s a delay on the phone—
—so I—I can’t really hear anything you’re, uh—
—If you could put pep—pineapple on the breadsticks and then just trip—
—[delay & reverb] triple that amount—whatever you would normally put, just triple that and then we could put that together with my pizza and then just put that together.
Uh, okay. I’m havin’ a hard time hearin’ ya, so right now, I got a small pineapple pizza, a large pineapple pizza—
—Small pineapple pizza. Okay. You got a small pineapple pizza, uh-huh.
Uh-huh. And a large pineapple pizza.
Oh! And then the breadsticks. [delay & reverb] Now, if you could take the breadsticks—
—[delay & reverb] If you—you have—you have breadsticks, right?
[delay & reverb] Yeah, if you could take the pineapples and triples what the normal portion you do—put ‘em on the breadsticks—so put it together that way, that would be the best for my order—
—I’m—I’m sorry. I can’t—I can’t hear ya.
Yeah. I guess it’s just on my end, then.
[samples of Wayne Bent ] Yes. Yes— Well, um— Yes—
Okay, so then what—what do you need me to repeat?
Um, I—so an order of breadsticks?
Yes. Just a regular order of breadsticks?
[delay & reverb] Well y—regular breadsticks, yeah, but if you took the pineapple—the, like, that you put on the pizza—?

—[delay & reverb] Is there any way you could triple, like, multiply the normal portion that you would use and put it on the breadsticks? That would be the best for—to put that with my pizza. That’d be good.
It’s weird! Every time you s—so when [laughs]
Every time I say something you repeat that you can’t hear—you’re like repeating yourself, or something. Can’t really understand what you’re saying—
—Yeah. Maybe there is a delay on both of our phones that—on both sides. Um—
—Can’t really understand what you’re sayin’ but can you do that with the breadstick?
I—I really couldn’t hear anything that you said with the breadsticks—
—[delay & reverb] Like, the same pineapple you put on the pizza, you know?
—[delay & reverb] Just put that on the pi—on the breadstick and then put it in triple the quantity that you would put on the pizza but just put it on—on the breadsticks instead of that.
We can’t put pineapples on the breadsticks.
[delay & reverb] Well, I mean, okay, you can put pepperoni on the breadsticks instead and kinda go it that way instead? You know?

Just for this once. I know, maybe it’s a custom order, I don’t know. I have—I don’t have a copy of your menu. [inhales] [delay & reverb] But if you just took the breadsticks and triple the pineapple on the br—
—We could do pineapple on cheese bread, if you’d like—

—[delay & reverb] Yeah! If you put the cheese bread on the pineapple, bud, on the pepperoni, that’d be super—and put it on the breadstick, that’d be good—instead of the pineapple, you know? If you—I—I know you’re particular about the way you like to—it’s what I’m hearing—you’re particular about the way you do that. So—

—don’t do the breadsticks. Scratch the breadstick. [delay & reverb] Take the cheese stick and put the triple, ah, pineapple instead of the pepperoni, on the cheese stick and the pepperoni—on the pepper—

—large order [delay & reverb] or something like in the pepperoni? Oh, and on the pepp—and I’m—I’m being told I wanna add, uh, sausage onto the pepperoni pizza. So triple sausage, triple pepperoni as well as the pineapple and something like that. [delay] Can we do all three of those? And, um, looking for a coupon, here. I think I have a coupon somewhere—
—I’ve got—so triple—[laughs]—triple pineapple on the cheese bread with pi—?
—[delay & reverb] Triple pineapple and something on the cheese bread, uh-huh—
—[delay & reverb] With pepperoni on it, yeah. Yeah, exactly! Okay, so you’re gonna do that. I’m with you, uh-huh.
—You’re—you’re like dropping out. I can’t really hear what you’re saying. But go ‘head. [delay & reverb] So ye—so r—
—and triple pepperoni on the order of cheese bread, is that right?—

—[delay & reverb] I wanna trip—yeah, exactly. Exactly, right, yeah! [delay] So, if you could put those together—put the pineapple on the cheese bread and then put the pineapple and the pepperoni on the pizza and I was being told I wanna add sausage on the pep—on the regular pizza if you could put those together and then you could do—and then you could put those together for me that’d be excellent! Super. Super, super. Super! And I have a coup—
—It sounds like there’s, like, a million of you talkin’ at once [chuckles]
[samples of Wayne Bent ] Yes— No!— No!— I swear it!—
[delay & reverb] And then I’ve got—I’ve got a coupon someplace. I’m not sure. Not sure where that is, but, uh, I’m looking f—
—Okay, I—I’m sorry, man, we’re gettin’ busy. I—if you wanna call back from another phone, I can complete your order.
[delay & reverb] Well, no. I’ve got the—I’ve got the coupon right here!
Okay, yeah, I can’t—I don’t have your order completed. I can’t understand what your—what you were ordering, so—
—Oh, which part do you need me to repeat?
It’d be best if you just called back from another, uh, phone number, I think.
Well four—uh, my phone number is, uh, 313 [delay] -5180 [delay]—
—I’ve got caller ID here, so I got the—I got your phone number, here—

—3-88-35 [delay & reverb]—oh, you got—good, okay, great. So, if you just put it all together I’ll pay cash when I get there. I’ll be there in—what?—45 minutes to an hour—something like th—[delay] ‘Bout fourty-five minutes to an hour? Is that enough time or…?
Uh, carry out time is different—I haven’t been able to complete your order ‘cause I can’t really hear what you’re—
—Okay, what part do you need me to repeat?
I got a large pineapple pizza and a 10-inch pineapple pizza—is that someone laughin’?
I thought that was on your end.
Uh, no! Nobody here but me. [sniffs]
Okay. Yeah, I’m just gonna have to have you—
—Oh, and the cheese bread! The cheese bread!—
—call from another phone number, man. I can’t complete the order.
The cheese bread was the only thing I need left.
A regular order of cheese bread?

[delay & reverb] No. I need to put the pepperoni and the pineapple on the cheese bread and b—and do triple the portion. So just take the pineapple and the pepperoni, put it on the cheese bread, put it all together, and then just put it o—like pineapple cheese bread with pepperoni on it, too. Just something like— [delay] And then we’ll be good!
